description_long: This is a thick, ornate book with a reddish-brown leather cover reinforced by gold metallic corner guards and spine accents. The front cover features a large, raised cross-shaped metallic inlay with a prominent blue gemstone set at its center, surrounded by a white panel. The book is closed, with two visible ribbon bookmarks—one blue and one red—protruding from the pages. The edges of the pages are white and appear slightly textured, suggesting high-quality paper. Decorative gold hardware, including a clasp and a small knob, add to the book's luxurious and secure appearance. The overall design suggests a magical or ceremonial tome, possibly used for important rituals or as a treasured artifact.
description: A thick, ornate book with a reddish-brown leather cover, gold metallic accents, and a blue gemstone centerpiece. Decorative hardware and ribbon bookmarks enhance its luxurious, ceremonial appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the curved spine, gold corner guards, and two ribbon bookmarks protruding from the pages.
description_view_1: Front-facing view highlighting the cross-shaped gold inlay, blue gemstone centerpiece, and decorative clasp hardware.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with gold corner guards and the blue gemstone visible on the cover, but no bookmarks protruding.
description_view_3: Back view showing the rounded spine and gold metallic reinforcement, with no visible bookmarks or cover details.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features a large, raised gold cross-shaped inlay with a prominent blue gemstone at its center, set against a white panel. The design is highly ornamental and geometric, with no pictorial illustration or imagery.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is rounded and covered in reddish-brown leather with gold metallic reinforcement at the ends. No text or decorative patterns are visible.
